Welcome to the program, Eliane. I am Mark, one of the coordinators. We have leaders from more than twenty countries here tonight.
Thank you, Mark. It is a real pleasure to be here.
So, tell me a little about your work. What do you do back in Brazil?
I am a gynecologist, and I specialize in reproductive medicine. I have worked in fertility care for over eight years.
Impressive. And have you presented your work internationally?
Yes, I have presented at three international congresses. I did my fellowship in reproductive endocrinology in 2016.
Wonderful. And what are you working on right now?
Right now, I am in the process of opening my own clinic with cutting-edge technology.
That is exciting. Let me introduce you to someone who runs a similar venture in Boston.
I have worked in fertility care for over eight years.
I have presented at several international congresses.
I did my fellowship in reproductive endocrinology in 2016.
Right now, I am in the process of launching my own clinic. And what about you?

Good afternoon. My name is Dr. Camila Duarte, and I am a reproductive endocrinologist. I have worked in assisted reproduction for more than a decade, and I have helped hundreds of families start their journey to parenthood. I did my fellowship at a leading center in Barcelona, and since then I have presented my research at conferences across Europe and the United States. Right now, I am leading a new program in embryology at my hospital. What I am most excited about is how cutting-edge technology is changing what we can offer our patients. Thank you, and I look forward to meeting many of you this week.

Hi Eliane, this is Mark from the executive program office. I am calling to confirm your place at the welcome dinner on Thursday. During the evening, each participant gives a short, one-minute introduction to the group. There is nothing to worry about. Just tell us who you are, what you specialize in, and one project you are excited about right now. Many people have told me it is the best part of the week. If you have any questions, feel free to call me back. We are all looking forward to meeting you. Talk soon.
